text.title: tailwind-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tailwind-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: JIT scans for string literals only. Interpolated class names are purged from the output CSS. Use lookup objects with full class strings.

failure-mode.description: Agents propose @apply chains in a shared stylesheet to abstract variants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: @apply in a global stylesheet defeats the per-component variant pattern. Variants belong in cva() next to the component. Reject @apply usage outside globals.css reset helpers.

failure-mode.description: Agents add new colors to tailwind.config but forget the matching CSS variable in globals.css.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The build succeeds (TypeScript passes) but dark mode renders the wrong color. Every new token in config needs a corresponding --token-name entry in both :root and .dark blocks.
